'''Kendalina''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Princess]] who served as a [[Nurse/Legends|nurse]] in an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] insane asylum on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] in [[7 BBY/Legends|7 BBY]].

==Biography==
The [[Jedi Princess]] Kendalina fell in love with an [[Prisoner/Legends|inmate]] named [[Triclops]] on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] and [[Reproduction/Legends|conceived]] a [[Parent/Legends|child]] with [[Gender/Legends|him]]. After that she was forced to work as a nurse in an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] insane asylum on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. When Kendalina was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the Galactic Empire, the child, named [[Ken]], was hidden in the [[Lost City of the Jedi]]. One of the droid caretakers that raised Ken after her death noted that he had a natural talent for the Jedi arts, much like herself.

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']] {{Mo}}
